ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime type */,
  "legal_code" TEXT /* Legal code or statute associated with the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., law enforcement, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or agency the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic the trend belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend was reported */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type the trend represents */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., percentage change) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_hotspots" (
  "hotspot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotspot */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic the hotspot belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the hotspot was reported */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type the hotspot represents */,
  "hotspot_value" REAL /* Value of the hotspot (e.g., crime rate) */,
  "hotspot_description" TEXT /* Description of the hotspot */,
  "radius" REAL /* Radius of the hotspot area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotspot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_hotspots_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic the visualization belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the visualization was reported */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type the visualization represents */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization (e.g., JSON) */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, map) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the visualization was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime statistic the report belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report was generated */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type the report represents */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data for the report (e.g., PDF) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., law enforcement, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES users_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)
